§ 01Deal Accepted

Dear {{brokerName}},

Forhemit confirms acceptance of the {{companyName}} deal for ESOP transaction stewardship. This letter outlines the commission terms and cooperation framework for the transaction.

Accepted
Deal Accepted for Stewardship
{{acceptanceDate}}
{{targetCloseDate}}
§ 02Commission Terms
{{listingAgreementRef}}
{{commissionRate}}
{{commissionBasis}}
Operating company — closing settlement
Wire on closing day
Forhemit's position: Forhemit does not adjust, share, defer, or appear as a line item affecting broker commission. The commission is determined solely by the listing agreement between the broker and the seller. Forhemit's stewardship fee is a separate, independent arrangement.
§ 03Cooperation Framework
A.Weekly status updates. Forhemit will send the broker headline-only status updates at each gate milestone. No confidential financial details — just progress indicators.
B.Closing coordination. Forhemit will notify the broker of the closing date at least 5 business days in advance and confirm commission wire timing.
C.Communication protocol. All broker communications should reference {{ref}}. Forhemit is the single point of contact — please do not contact the seller's deal team directly unless coordinated through Forhemit.
D.Confidentiality. All deal information shared with the broker is confidential. Do not disclose the transaction, terms, or company identity to any third party without Forhemit's written consent.
§ 04Next Steps
